character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Involved in ship preparations and medical practice. Received a letter regarding the ship's readiness.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Working in Bristol, involved in ship-related plans. Mentioned in correspondence.

character_dossiers.name: old Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Gamekeeper at the hall, responsible for reading letters. Described as a poor reader.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Linked to the letter's delivery. Possibly a relative of old Redruth.

character_dossiers.name: young Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Under the charge of old Redruth. Tasked with visiting his mother.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Ship's cook, former sailor with a lost leg. Described as a man of substance.

character_dossiers.name: Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Friend who secured the ship HISPANIOLA. Subject of local rumors.

character_dossiers.name: John Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Author of the letter regarding the ship's preparation and crew.

character_dossiers.name: Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Sailing mate selected by Long John Silver. Described as competent.
